name: Cold Case Files: The Rifkin Murders
original_name: Cold Case Files: The Rifkin Murders
overview: Documents the real-time New York State Police cold case investigation into the two unidentified victims of serial killer Joel Rifkin, the most prolific serial killer in New York State history.
